source: bloonswiki-aligned: damage-type immunities derived from utils/btd6/damage_types.py (bloonswiki Template:BTD6 dt port); MOAB-class HP / children are canonical base values. RBE (Red Bloon Equivalent) = (health or 1) + sum(child RBE), bottoming out at Red=1; recomputed from children text by tests/unit/services/test_btd6_rbe.py.

bloons.description: The most basic bloon: 1 health, no immunities. It is the bottom of the spawn chain — when popped it reveals nothing. The RBE of every other bloon is measured in Red Bloon Equivalents (how many Red-pop-equivalents it takes to fully clear it and everything it spawns).
Basic bloon with 1 health and no immunities. When popped it reveals 1 Red Bloon.
Basic bloon with 1 health and no immunities. When popped it reveals 1 Blue Bloon.
Fast basic bloon with 1 health and no immunities. When popped it reveals 1 Green Bloon.
Fastest basic bloon with 1 health and no immunities. When popped it reveals 1 Yellow Bloon. Pink is NOT the bottom of the chain — it spawns Yellow, which spawns Green, then Blue, then Red.

bloons.popped_by: Explosion, Fire, Plasma, Glacier, Acid, or Normal damage
bloons.description: Immune to Sharp damage, so most basic dart/projectile attacks cannot pop it unupgraded. Needs Explosion, Fire, Plasma, Glacier, Acid, or Normal damage.

bloons.popped_by: any non-explosive damage (darts, fire, ice, etc.)
bloons.description: Immune to Explosion damage (Bomb Shooter, Mortar, etc.). Any non-explosive damage pops it.

bloons.popped_by: any non-cold damage (darts, explosions, fire, etc.)
bloons.description: Immune to Cold / ice damage (Ice Monkey, etc.). Any non-cold damage pops it.

bloons.popped_by: Sharp, Explosion, Cold, Glacier, Acid, or Normal damage
bloons.description: Immune to Fire, Energy/Plasma, and Magic damage. Sharp, Explosion, and Cold damage still pop it.

bloons.popped_by: Sharp, Fire, Plasma, Acid, or Normal damage
bloons.description: Has both Black and White properties: immune to Explosion and Cold damage. Pops into one Black and one White Bloon.
No damage-type immunity. Pops into two Zebra Bloons.

bloons.popped_by: any damage type, but the shell takes 10 hits
bloons.description: Tough shell with no damage-type immunity but 10 layers of health; resists single-hit pops. Pops into two Rainbow Bloons.
Massive Ornary Air Blimp. MOAB-class blimp with 200 HP and no camo/lead properties. Pops into four Ceramic Bloons.
Brutal Floating Behemoth. MOAB-class blimp with 700 HP. Pops into four MOABs.
Zeppelin of Mighty Gargantuaness. MOAB-class blimp with 4000 HP. Pops into four BFBs.
Dark Dirigible Titan. Has Camo, Lead, and Black properties, so it needs camo detection and is immune to Sharp and Explosion damage. Very fast; 400 HP. Pops into four camo Ceramics.
Big Airship of Doom. Strongest standard blimp at 20000 HP; immune to knockback, stuns, and most status effects. Pops into three ZOMGs and two DDTs.
A camo modifier: only towers with camo detection (e.g. Ninja Monkey innately, or via support such as Monkey Village 0-2-0 or Alchemist) can target it.
A regrow modifier: the bloon regrows its popped outer layers over time unless it is fully destroyed.
A fortified modifier: roughly doubles a bloon's health, and increases MOAB-class HP substantially.
